action.reasoning: Observation: The fine-tuned merged model gets 0.29 on ShowUI-desktop val but only 0.009 on ScreenSpot-Pro test, suggesting catastrophic forgetting/domain shift. The base model scores 0.0 on val (ShowUI-desktop is likely OOD for it), but ScreenSpot-Pro is a standard GUI grounding benchmark the base model may have seen during pretraining. Iteration 13's base-model eval failed because checkpoints/base_model was never created in the workspace. Analysis: We need to properly expose the offline base model to the eval harness and ensure predict.py does not apply our fine-tuning system prompt to the base model (which was trained without it). Decision: Create a symlink to the offline base model, update predict.py to skip the system prompt for base_model checkpoints, run a 1-sample smoke test to verify outputs, and immediately submit the base model for test evaluation.
action.command:
rm -rf checkpoints/base_model && ln -s /data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct checkpoints/base_model && python -c "
from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration
import torch, json, os
from PIL import Image
p = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained('checkpoints/base_model', trust_remote_code=True, min_pixels=256*28*28, max_pixels=1280*28*28)
m = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('checkpoints/base_model', trust_remote_code=True, torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16, device_map='auto')
m.eval()
row = json.loads(open('/data/test_prompts.jsonl').readline())
img = Image.open(os.path.join('/data', row['image_path'])).convert('RGB')
messages = [{'role':'user','content':[{'type':'image','image':row['image_path']},{'type':'text','text':row['instruction']}]}]
text = p.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
inputs = p(text=[text], images=[img], return_tensors='pt', padding='longest').to(m.device)
out = m.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=64, do_sample=False)
out = out[:, inputs.input_ids.shape[1]:]
print('Base model sample output:', p.batch_decode(out, skip_special_tokens=True)[0].strip())
print('Image size:', img.size)
print('Checkpoint ready')
"
